hooks.command: cd /home/user/gestion-chantier && node scripts/audit-btp.js --quick 2>&1 | tail -6 | jq -Rsc '{"systemMessage": "🔍 Audit BTP — " + .}' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.js$' && cd /home/user/gestion-chantier && node scripts/audit-btp.js --quick 2>&1 | grep -E '(CRITIQUE|\u2705)' | head -3; } 2>/dev/null || true
